structured_payload_candidate.title: Leaking Damper Alarm
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Generate Level 4 alarm if damper position = 0% and airflow sensor reading exceeds max(10% Vcool-max, 50 cfm) for 10 minutes while fan is proven ON.
structured_payload_candidate.fault_condition: Damper position 0%, airflow > max(10% Vcool-max, 50 cfm) for 10 minutes, fan proven ON → Level 4 alarm.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: 5.8.6.5.  Leaking Damper. If the damper position is 0%,  and airflow sensor reading is above the larger of 10% of the cooling maximum airflow setpoint  or 50 cfm for 10 minutes while fan serving the zone is proven ON, generate a Level 4 alarm.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Testing/Commissioning Overrides
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Provide software switches interlocked to a system-level point for forcing airflow setpoints, damper, heating, fan control, and resetting request-hours accumulators.
structured_payload_candidate.commissioning_check: Provide software switches that interlock to a system level point to force: a. zone airflow setpoint to zero, b. zone airflow setpoint to Vcool-max, c. zone airflow setpoint to Vmin, d. damper full closed/open, e. heating to off/closed, f. fan on/off, g. reset request-hours accumulator point to zero.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote:
Provide software switches that interlock to a system level point to
a. force  zone airflow setpoint  to zero ,
b. force  zone airflow setpoint  to Vcool -max,
c. force  zone airflow setpoint  to Vmin ,
d. force  damper full closed/open ,
e. force  heating to off/closed ,
f. turn fan on/off , and
g. reset  request -hours accumulator point to zero (provide one point for each reset type listed in the next section ).

structured_payload_candidate.title: Cooling SAT Reset Requests
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Send cooling SAT reset requests based on zone temperature deviation or cooling loop output: 3 req for >3°C/5°F for 2 min, 2 req for >2°C/3°F for 2 min, 1 req if Cooling Loop >95% until <85%, else 0.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Send specified number of requests upstream.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote:
5.8.8.1.  Cooling SAT Reset Requests
a. If the  zone temperature exceeds the zone’s cooling setpoint  by 3°C (5°F) for 2 minutes and after suppression period due to setpoint  change per Section 5.1.20 , send 3 requests.
b. Else if the zone temperature exceeds the zone’s cooling setpoint  by 2°C (3°F) for 2 minutes and after suppression period due to setpoint  change per Section 5.1.20 , send 2 requests.
c. Else if the Cooling Loop  is greater than 95%, send 1 request  until the Cooling Loop  is less than 85%.
d. Else if the Cooling Loop  is less than 95%, send 0 requests.

anchor_repair_reason: evidence_quote replaced with verbatim section heading line
rejection_reason: weak evidence_quote: section heading without supporting rule

structured_payload_candidate.title: Static Pressure Reset Requests
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Send static pressure reset requests based on airflow deficiency and damper position: 3 req if airflow <50% setpoint and damper >95% for 1 min, 2 req if <70% and damper >95% for 1 min, 1 req if damper >95% until <85%, else 0.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Send specified number of requests upstream.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote:
5.8.8.2.  Static Pressure Reset Requests
a. If the measured airflow is less than 50% of setpoint  while setpoint  is greater than zero and the damper position is greater than 95% for 1 minute, send 3 requests.
b. Else if the measured airflow is less than 70% of setpoint  while setpoint  is greater than zero and the damper position is greater than 95% for 1 minute, send 2 requests.
c. Else if the damper  position is greater than 95%, send 1 request  until the damper  position is less than 85 %.
d. Else if the damper  position is less than 95%, send 0 requests.
